# Shreejit Verma

> Quantitative Developer, Quantitative Researcher, and Quantitative Trading Engineer based in New York, NY.
> Specializes in C++ low-latency automated market making, FPGA/DPDK sub-10 microsecond trading systems,
> statistical arbitrage, merger arbitrage, and machine-learning-driven alpha research for hedge funds,
> proprietary trading firms, and high frequency trading firms.

Most recent role: C++ Quantitative Developer (Co-op), Automated Market Making at BNP Paribas CIB, New York (Feb 2026 - May 2026).
Education: M.S. Financial Engineering (Stevens Institute of Technology, GPA 3.974/4.0); M.S. Computer Science in progress (Georgia Institute of Technology, expected Dec 2026); M.S. Financial Engineering (WorldQuant University).
